case_title: MICHAEL MIRANDA VS. JESUS FERNANDO GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY APPELLANT MIRANDA, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF OF MICHAEL MIRANA IN SUPPORT OF MTN TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND REOPEN DISCOVERY FILED BY RESPONDENT MIRANDA, MICHAEL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-14-2014 IN 206, PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND TO REOPEN DISCOVERY. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/19/14 IS CONTINUED TO 10/27/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY IS RE-OPENED AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOHN STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $46,131.98 RE 32412 FOR TRANSACTION W3614227D004 (OTHER TRUST DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO LITTLER MENDELSON, DOC #1906611577, WARRANT #38203679, DATED FEB-24-2015
